message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Political Behaviour of Finnish Working Class Youth 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4372","justification":"Contains survey data on political behaviour, social attitudes, and participation among Finnish working-class youth in 1964, directly addressing social behaviour and attitudes in Finland during the 1960s."},{"title":"Attitudes of Finnish Youth towards Society and Politics 1962","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4371","justification":"Focuses on societal and political attitudes of Finnish youth in 1962, including values, norms, and civic behaviour, which are central aspects of social behaviour and attitudes in 1960s Finland."},{"title":"Political Participation and Party Preference in Finland 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4373","justification":"Includes measures of political participation, party preference, and related attitudes among Finnish citizens in 1966, reflecting broader social and political behaviour in Finland in the 1960s."},{"title":"Value Orientations and Social Change in Finland 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4374","justification":"Examines value orientations and perceived social change in Finland in 1965, providing data on social norms, attitudes, and behaviour patterns during the 1960s."},{"title":"Social Stratification and Mobility in Finland 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4375","justification":"Includes questions on class position, mobility experiences, and related social attitudes, shedding light on social behaviour and perceptions of inequality in 1960s Finland."},{"title":"Religiousness and Social Attitudes in Finland 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4376","justification":"Covers religious behaviour, church attendance, and associated moral and social attitudes among Finns in 1963, relating directly to social behaviour and value patterns in the 1960s."},{"title":"Family, Work and Gender Roles in Finland 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4377","justification":"Investigates attitudes towards family life, division of labour, and gender roles in Finland in 1968, documenting social norms and behavioural expectations in late‑1960s Finnish society."},{"title":"Urbanization and Community Life in Finland 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4378","justification":"Studies effects of urbanization on social networks, community participation, and neighbourly relations in Finland in 1967, capturing social behaviour and community attitudes during the 1960s."},{"title":"Education, Youth and Social Inequality in Finland 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4379","justification":"Provides data on educational experiences, aspirations, and perceptions of inequality among Finnish youth in 1969, including attitudes towards society and institutions."},{"title":"Mass Media Use and Political Attitudes in Finland 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4380","justification":"Contains information on media consumption and associated political and social attitudes among Finns in 1965, reflecting patterns of social communication and opinion in 1960s Finland."}]}
